name: Crystal PET 0.5L
description: Ultra-clear PET bottle with excellent barrier properties. Lightweight yet durable, perfect for still water and juices. Features a precision-molded neck finish for secure cap sealing.

name: EcoLine PET 1L
description: Our flagship 1-liter PET bottle designed for maximum clarity and structural integrity. Ideal for carbonated and non-carbonated beverages. Eco-friendly design uses 15% less plastic than industry standard.

name: ProPack PET 2L
description: Heavy-duty 2-liter PET bottle built for carbonated beverages. Enhanced base design for superior stability. Premium-grade PET resin ensures long shelf life and taste preservation.
